title: M3D Market Trigger — Atomic Actionable Signal
description: Every trigger from Grok Pulse Daemon must conform to this schema. Gaming-detected triggers are discarded before reaching HALO.

urgency.description: NOW = enter within 60s. 5MIN = within 5 min before priced in.

ticker.description: e.g. BTCUSDT, SPY, GLD. null = market-wide signal

confidence.description: Grok confidence this event moves price materially

source_confidence.description: Grok confidence the source is REAL — not gamed, coordinated, or astroturfed. Below 60 = do not trade.

gaming_detected.description: True if Grok detects coordinated amplification, fake accounts, wash trading signals, or manufactured narrative. DISCARD if true.

examples: Coordinated X accounts amplifying same text
On-chain volume inconsistent with exchange data
Story appears on 12 low-DA sites simultaneously

entry_window_min.description: Minutes before this catalyst is likely fully priced in

expert_votes.description: How each swarm persona voted on this trigger

dissent.description: Key dissent point if expert_votes are split

halo_auto.description: Whether this trigger qualifies for automatic HALO JUMP scheduling. Requires: gaming_detected=false AND source_confidence>=80 AND confidence>=75 AND urgency in [NOW, 5MIN]

outcome.description: Filled in by IC feedback loop after the window expires
